response.justification: The candidate far exceeds the technical requirements — nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js, React exposure, Kubernetes, and even current LLM/MCP agent tooling work that matches the nice-to-haves. However, this is an entry-level position and the candidate is a Staff-level engineer, creating a significant overqualification risk around compensation expectations, engagement, and retention. Additionally, the candidate is based in São Paulo while the role demands high on-site presence, which is a substantial practical barrier unless relocation is confirmed.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and fullstack expertise well beyond the role's requirements
Hands-on LLM, MCP, and AI-agent infrastructure experience matching nice-to-have qualifications
Strong engineering culture background (TDD, CI/CD, Kubernetes, open source contributions)
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and salary-fit risk
Based in São Paulo, conflicting with the high on-site presence requirement
PostgreSQL and Nest.js not explicitly evidenced (MongoDB/MySQL background instead)

key_factors.factor: Technical stack fit incl. LLM experience
